name: Evidence for Negligent Forklift Operation North Salt Lake

mainEntity.name: What evidence proves employer negligence in North Salt Lake forklift crash?
mainEntity.text: What evidence proves employer negligence in North Salt Lake forklift crash?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maintenance logs, training records, witness statements, video, OSHA violations, pre-accident complaints.

suggestedAnswer.text: North Salt Lake refineries ignore PM schedules. Subpoena black box, download telematics. Builds third-party case despite comp bar.

description: Maintenance logs, training records, witness statements, video, OSHA violations, pre-accident complaints.
